final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotional campaign.

Style/medium: needs a layered typography aesthetic with artistic lettering — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must include overlapping/stacked typography with product or subject partially obscuring some text, complex but not cluttered
Subject: must include a product or main subject positioned to block portions of the text
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve layered/artistic typography treatment, text stacking must be visible, partial occlusion by subject must be present, overall complexity without visual chaos
Avoid:
